name: codex-process-jobs
description: Portable detached process job runtime for Codex
author: Joel Farthing

scripts.check: node --check scripts/job.mjs && node --check scripts/worker.mjs && node --check scripts/execution.mjs && node --check scripts/notifier.mjs && node --check scripts/preferences.mjs && node --check scripts/desktop-ipc.mjs && node --check scripts/session.mjs && node --check scripts/cli-entry.mjs && node --check scripts/install.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke.mjs && node --check hooks/unread-result-hook.mjs && node --check benchmarks/token-savings/evidence.mjs && node --check benchmarks/token-savings/synthetic-build.mjs && node --check benchmarks/token-savings/run.mjs && node --test
